text: I often write during flights; the app refuses to save notes offline and I lose edits.
No offline editing on subway commutes makes the app unreliable for me.
Offline mode would be helpful for travel; right now I plan around connectivity.
App locks me out when disconnected; can't even edit quick checklists.
After reconnecting, two versions of my note conflicted and mine was overwritten.
Sync after offline periods is slow and sometimes fails until I restart the app.
Startup is fast on my phone; basic navigation feels smooth.
The tutorial made it easy to create my first note and find the editor.
